title: Tidal-Gauge Harmonic Recovery -- extrapolating Fourier-sparse symbolic regression
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean of the training tide heights (ignores all periodicity) -> ~0.1
single-harmonic periodogram: fit only the dominant tidal constituent by a cos/sin least-squares frequency scan; misses secondary constituents so extrapolation is partial
iterated matching pursuit: peel off the strongest tidal-band frequency, subtract, repeat with adaptive stopping to recover the sparse set of constituents, then refine each frequency locally
alternatives: finer frequency grids, joint nonlinear refinement of all frequencies/phases, or trading the complexity penalty against held-out error by dropping weak constituents
